title: Software Update - DFU - Incoming mobile phone call during update
scenario: Verify DFU continues or completes successfully when an incoming phone call is received and answered during the update process.
steps: Start a DFU (Device Firmware Update) process on the target device.
While the DFU is in progress, initiate an incoming mobile phone call to the device.
Answer the incoming phone call during the DFU process.
Monitor the DFU process to see if it continues running or completes.
After the call ends, check the final status of the DFU.
expected: The DFU process continues running or completes successfully despite the incoming call being received and answered.
